privileged_info_summary: This disaster recovery drill task generates synthetic data consisting of a PostgreSQL database with 599 customer records, 1000 film records, and 16044 rental records in a Pagila-like schema, plus 50 Redis session keys. Data is generated dynamically by Python and Bash scripts during task setup. All directory paths are correctly specified: project at /home/ga/projects/disaster-recovery, backups at /home/ga/backups, and runbook at /home/ga/Desktop/recovery_runbook.md. The task requires a minimum score of 65 points to pass, with critical requirement that Docker volumes must be destroyed and recreated (verified by creation timestamps) during the disaster simulation phase.
